name: Warmed Cranberry Brie
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the top rind of 1 round (8oz) brie cheese, leaving a 1/4-inch rim.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the cranberry sauce, brown sugar, rum or orange extract, and nutmeg until well combined.
3. Place the brie on a serving plate.
4. Spread the cranberry mixture evenly over the surface of the brie.
5. Sprinkle the chopped pecans over the top.
6. Bake in an oven set to 500°F for 4-5 minutes.
7. Serve with assorted crackers.
